name: FastQC
description: Quality control analysis for linked single-end or paired-end FASTQ files

inputs.name: Linked FASTQ files
inputs.description: FASTQ files already linked to order samples
inputs.sourceDescription: Read records linked to selected order samples

outputs.name: Per-sample FastQC HTML report
outputs.description: Interactive HTML quality report for each sample
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for review and download

outputs.name: Per-sample FastQC data archive
outputs.description: Zip archive with detailed QC metrics per sample
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for downstream use

outputs.name: FastQC summary
outputs.description: Run-level summary of pass/warn/fail status across all samples
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a run artifact for provenance and download

steps.name: Run FastQC
steps.description: Execute FastQC quality analysis on input reads
